title: salvia carnosa subsp. pilosa
intro: Salvia carnosa subsp. pilosa is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Salvia, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used for its expectorant properties, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Salvia carnosa subsp. pilosa include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing pain, inflammation, and the risk of infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used to support respiratory health and alleviate cold and flu symptoms.
